# David Lopez

> Full-stack developer. Laravel, Vue, and AI-integrated systems. Networking background (Mikrotik, carrier-grade WISP infrastructure).

## About

- [Homepage — hire, bio, portfolio](https://dleolopez.dev/)
- [Contact](https://dleolopez.dev/contact)

## Blog

- [Shipping Real-World IA: How I Build Maintainable LLM Systems](https://dleolopez.dev/shipping-real-world-ia-how-i-build-maintainable-llm-systems): LLM architecture, RAG patterns, evaluation loops, and shipping maintainable AI systems.
- [Carrier-Grade Networking Lessons from the Yaesu IMRS Build in Australia](https://dleolopez.dev/ham-radio-meets-carrier-grade-networking-yaesu-imrs-australia): BGP, OSPF, and Mikrotik at scale, applied to ham radio infrastructure.

## Topics

- AI engineering: LLMs, RAG, prompt engineering, evaluation, observability
- Network architecture: BGP, OSPF, Mikrotik, WISP infrastructure
- Full-stack: Laravel, Vue.js, React.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
